name: Ollama With Open Webui
tagline: Ollama with Open Web UI integrates AI model deployment with a user-friendly interface.
description:
Ollama with Open Web UI integrates AI model deployment with a user-friendly interface.

Docs: https://docs.openwebui.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  ollama-api:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    volumes:
      - ollama:/root/.ollama
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - ollama
        - list
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
  open-webui:
    image: ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main
    volumes:
      - open-webui:/app/backend/data
    depends_on:
      - ollama-api
    environment:
      - OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://ollama-api:11434
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:8080
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42085:80
volumes:
  ollama: null
  open-webui: null
